name: @rukkiecodes/native
description: FusionUI mobile — copy-in React Native components. Add one with the CLI; you own the source after that.

text.title: Text
text.description: Typography primitive: size or heading level (H1–H6), weight, colour variants, alignment, truncation, skeleton loading, prefix/suffix, and press support. Defaults to the Poppins typeface.

button.title: Button
button.description: Button with web-parity features: variants (solid, relief, shadow, floating, link), a size scale, block, icon / icon-only, circle & square shapes, a loading overlay and an upload sweep, gradient fill, and href links. Ships ButtonGroup for segmented rows.

gooey-switch.title: Gooey Switch
gooey-switch.description: A gooey toggle with fluid metaball blobs: a Skia canvas (blur + colour-matrix goo) melds a moving blob between the on/off ends, driven by Reanimated; drag or tap to toggle.

apple-intelligence.title: Apple Intelligence
apple-intelligence.description: An Apple-Intelligence-style overlay provider. Wrap your UI in <SiriProvider>, then call useSiri().toggle() to snapshot it and paint an SKSL shader over it — wave, noise, glow, shimmer and a glowing border, fading in and out.

aurora.title: Aurora
aurora.description: A Skia + Reanimated aurora: flowing bands of light drift over a soft night-sky gradient, driven by an SKSL noise shader on a per-frame clock. Colours, speed, intensity and drift direction are all configurable.

badge.title: Badge
badge.description: A compact status / label chip: colour variants (default, success, warning, error, pending, notifications), three sizes, a full radius scale, and an optional leading icon.

input.title: Input
input.description: A text field mirroring the web FInput: variants (default, underlined, shadow), state tints, prepend/append icon cards that lift out on focus, floating & pinned labels, clearable, loading, password reveal, a strength/progress bar, and hint / error / success messages.

select.title: Select
select.description: A select built on the same field shell as the Input: variants (default, underlined, shadow), state tints, prepend + dropdown icon cards that lift on open, floating & pinned labels, single or multiple (collapsible chips), a filter search box, group headers, clearable, loading, and hint / error / success messages.

checkbox.title: Checkbox
checkbox.description: A checkbox mirroring the web FCheckbox: the box fills with the accent colour while the check mark draws itself on, plus an indeterminate dash, a custom icon slot, line-through labels, a loading ring, three sizes, and array models for checkbox groups.
